bead.title: Amend CONTRACT-008: authenticated-by-default service installs (FEAT-028 BIN-10)
bead.description: FEAT-028 BIN-10 (docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-028-unified-binary.md) now requires service installs to be authenticated by default, but CONTRACT-008 (docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-008-cli-and-config.md) still records a no-auth default. Amend CONTRACT-008 to match BIN-10, then reconcile axon install / axon serve defaults (crates/axon-cli, crates/axon-server) with the amended contract.
bead.acceptance: CONTRACT-008 records authenticated-by-default for service installs and documents the explicit opt-out flag; grep of CONTRACT-008 finds no no-auth-default language; CLI/server default behavior matches the amended contract with a test asserting a fresh service install rejects unauthenticated requests.
